iterations.theme: From Vocation to Humanitarianism: A Personal Journey of Faith, Empathy, and the Challenges of Helping Others
iterations.reason_for_cut: This iteration covers the entire podcast, as its duration (36:32) falls within the specified 35-45 minute range, and all topics flow logically within this single segment.
